'''Whool''' was an unpleasant and rude [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who owned a general store in a [[Hunting lodge]] of [[Rodia/Legends|homeworld]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]] were after a Rodian hiding under the identification of "[[Ruku Kooff]]", who had come to the lodge during a business hunting expedition. After sabotaging their equipment, they also instructed Whool to sell them tampered equipment in case they decided to replace them, such as busted [[comlink/Legends|comlinks]], and [[Blaster power pack/Legends|power packs]] set to explode. Whool also had a power meter rigged in order to sell them as "fully charged".

==Appearances==
